content.question: Does SNI classification currently function as an inclusion incentive or an exclusion barrier in institutional admissions and resourcing decisions, and does this differ by region, institution type, and severity category (BTMN vs. intellectual disability)?
content.reduction_path: Audit current institutional normative funding regulations and admissions policies; survey institution heads on resource constraints and placement preferences; analyze school-level admission rates for SEN-classified students vs. unclassified peers controlling for aptitude/behavior measures.
